ogTitle: Hartys Plains vs Hassall Grove: Climate Safety

heading: Hartys Plains vs Hassall Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hartys Plains, New South Wales and Hassall Grove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hartys Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Hassall Grove (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hartys Plains or Hassall Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hartys Plains has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Hassall Grove scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hartys Plains scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Hassall Grove scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hartys Plains or Hassall Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hartys Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
